_description: Canonical placeholder → env-var / default mapping. Consumed by setup.sh and setup.ps1. Every entry's 'name' (without braces) becomes {{NAME}} in templates. 'env' (optional) names the shell variable to source from; 'default' is used when env is missing or empty. Parity across setup.sh and setup.ps1 is enforced by tests/check-placeholders.sh.

placeholders.name: NOTIFY_DEPLOY_SUCCESS
placeholders.default: No notification system configured. Log deploy success.

placeholders.name: NOTIFY_MERGE_RESOLVE
placeholders.default: No notification system configured. Log merge resolution message.

placeholders.name: ERROR_QUERY_COMMAND
placeholders.default: Configure error query command for your monitoring system.

placeholders.name: ERROR_TRACKING_PATTERN
placeholders.default: // Log the error with full context
